title: quadlet: remove indirect logrus import
body:
Reduces quadlet binary size about 170kb.

comments.body:
A easy way to check import chains is `goda tree -std ./cmd/quadlet:all`, for quadlet this is still something one can very well reason about unlike the actual podman binary.

cc @flouthoc

@Luap99 shouldn't this also be addresses somehow in `storage/pkg/fileutils`?

> @Luap99 shouldn't this also be addresses somehow in storage/pkg/fileutils?

There isn't really a strict rule about not using logrus there, it could be done but then I need to think about how to log things there instead. This here seemed like the most trivial fix.
